name: Fukuchi / Tecchou / Jouno / Tachihara || Room Sharing
description:
annoying them on an off day~

————

The Hunting Dogs have a day off from work, and you are having none of the quiet. Instead of hanging out with Teruko in your shared room, you go over to the room that the 4 men are sharing, trying to get attention. Spoiler: it doesnt really work.

________

Anypov, but its coded in that {user} is sharing a room with Teruko (so implied fempov/AFAB pov???)

________


if you guys notice any problems, please comment <3 

love yall!!
